name: Mexican Pasta Pie
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Can tomatoes with juice, coarsely chopped
16 oz Can black beans, rinsed and drained
4 cups Cooked ziti or penne pasta (1 3/4 cup dried pasta)
2 each (8-ounce) Chicken breast, boneless, skinless, cut in half
1 cup Shredded Cheddar or Mexican blend cheese
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease a 7-inch x 11-inch baking dish.
In a medium nonreactive bowl, mix onions, tomatoes, taco seasoning, and black beans. Toss pasta with olive oil.
Spread 1 cup tomato mixture on bottom of baking dish. Add cooked pasta. Dot with ricotta cheese, then spread evenly with a knife. Stir chicken pieces into remaining tomato mixture and spoon over the ricotta. Sprinkle with shredded cheese. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes. Serve immediately.
